Hoolheyak:TheLibraryPatch.NAME: The Library
DESCRIPTIONS: You find some precious rare books and record their contents.
OPTIONS: [Record] Choose and obtain #b1 #yRare card of a random color.

Hoolheyak:IntersectionOfPastAndPresent.NAME: Intersection of Past and Present
DESCRIPTIONS: The sound of scraping metal comes from behind you, followed by that signature male voice. NL " #rHoolheyak, #rtraitor. #rDid #ryou #rcome #rto #rthis #rSpire #rjust #rto #rsatisfy #ryour #rridiculous #rthirst #rfor #rknowledge? " NL It is the #yTin #yMan . Given your past encounters, you know full well that clashing with him will only put you at a disadvantage.

" #g~Oh~ #g~my,~ #g~if~ #g~it~ #g~isn't~ #g~Mr.~ #g~Tin~ #g~Man.~ #g~What~ #g~a~ #g~pleasure.~ #g~To~ #g~tell~ #g~you~ #g~the~ #g~truth,~ #g~I~ #g~am~ #g~indeed~ #g~here~ #g~to~ #g~study~ #g~this~ #g~tower.~ " NL " #rIn #rthat #rcase, #ryou #rshould #rbe #rcareful. #rThis #rplace #ris #rnot #rthat #rsafe. " NL He shares some of his belongings with you. You then part ways.

" #g~I~ #g~am~ #g~a~ #g~historian,~ #g~isn't~ #g~research~ #g~my~ #g~very~ #g~job?~ " NL " #rIt #rseems #ryou #rstill #rhaven't #rlearned #ryour #rlesson #rfrom #rour #rlast #rencounter. #rI #rthought #ryou #rwould #rbe #rslightly #rsmarter. " NL As soon as his words fall, you feel your heart being #r@gripped@ for a moment. By the time you recover, he is gone.

" #g~As~ #g~you~ #g~can~ #g~see,~ #g~Mr.~ #g~Tin~ #g~Man.~ #g~I~ #g~believe~ #g~you~ #g~surely~ #g~wouldn't~ #g~leave~ #g~a~ #g~former~ #g~colleague~ #g~to~ #g~die,~ #g~right?~ " NL " #rHmph, #rsmooth #rtalker. #rIn #ra #rplace #rlike #rthis, #ryou #rshould #rhave #rbeen #rmore #rcareful. " NL He shoves two potions into your hands. You then part ways.

Hoolheyak:FalseDome.NAME: False Dome
DESCRIPTIONS: You finally climbed to the heights of the #ySpire . Looking up, the ceiling is inlaid with countless shimmering, bizarre ores. They are arranged according to some precise mathematical law, masquerading as a brilliant starry sky in this endless darkness. NL You pause. This false dome reminds you of an old acquaintance, a mad pioneer, and that spaceship that broke through the barriers of #yTerra .
You record the orbital laws of these forged stars in your mind; they confirm some of your previous hypotheses.
The past is not worth mentioning, and the present likewise leads to the future.
OPTIONS: [Analyze Trajectories] Choose #b3 cards in your deck to #gUpgrade .
[Seek the Future] #rRemove all #rCurse cards from your deck.

Hoolheyak:WaterLikeShape.NAME: Shape Like Water
DESCRIPTIONS: Clear water gushes from cracks beneath you, swirling into a familiar figure. NL " #bWhat #ba #bdisgusting #bfeather #bstench, #beven #bin #bthis #bbroken #btower . " You look towards the voice; it is #yMuelsyse . NL " #g~Still~ #g~holding~ #g~a~ #g~grudge,~ #g~my~ #g~lovely~ #g~elf?~ " Water blasts at you instantly. You raise your staff barely in time. NL " #bSince #bwe're #balone, #bI'll #bjust #bdrown #byou #band #bstuff #byou #binto #ba #bdefected #brobot . "

You sigh, pull out an extremely precious document from your files, and hand it over: " #g~Don't~ #g~be~ #g~so~ #g~angry.~ #g~A~ #g~valuable~ #g~trade~ #g~for~ #g~a~ #g~little~ #g~'assistance'~ #g~from~ #g~you,~ #g~how~ #g~about~ #g~it?~ " NL #yMuelsyse stares at the document for a moment before snatching it away. " #b...Fine, #bthis #bis #bmine #bnow. " She turns her head, her tone softening slightly, " #bLet's #bget #bone #bthing #bstraight: #bfor #bthe #bsake #bof #bthe #bgift, #bI'll #bspare #byour #blife #bthis #btime, #bfeathered #bserpent. "

" #g~Oh~ #g~my,~ #g~speaking~ #g~of~ #g~defect,~ " you point to the ruins behind her, " #g~look,~ #g~isn't~ #g~that~ #g~a~ #g~defected~ #g~robot~ #g~lying~ #g~by~ #g~the~ #g~road?~ " NL " #bWhat? #bWhere? " NL In the split second the elf turns to look, you lightly leap onto a high wall. Of course, as a qualified agent, you don't forget to conveniently "borrow" something from her before leaving.
" #g~I~ #g~told~ #g~you,~ #g~I~ #g~don't~ #g~like~ #g~my~ #g~feathers~ #g~getting~ #g~wet.~ " NL You step over the now unconscious water elf, adjust your belongings, and continue onward.
OPTIONS: [Prepare for Battle] Enter a #rHard combat. Reward: #yRare #yRelic .
[Make an Excuse to Slip Away] Gain #b1 random #gCommon Relic.
